meaning: n.不透明物adj.不透明的,不传热的,迟钝的
examples: You can always use opaque glass if you need to block a street view.
The clusters diffracted light, making the solution opaque.
Metals are opaque, so the other electrode must be transparent.
Like its neighbours, Thailand suffers from an unhealthy combination of patronage and opaque business activities.
"I believe the opaque bags will still be a first for Wales, " said a council spokesman.
